title: Managing tasks on monday.com (recording)
excerpt:
In this session knowledge expert Leora discusses best practices for task management using different monday.com tools, including MyWork, Item notifications, filtering, mentions, your inbox, and more!

posts.cookedHtml:
In this session knowledge expert Leora discusses best practices for task management using different monday.com tools, including MyWork, Item notifications, filtering, mentions, your inbox, and more!

Want to stay updated with more community events? Check out our community calendar https://community.monday.com/
